comments.comment: substance releases minimal amounts of pollution into the air. substance is used to coat steel in production of galvanized materials.
Waste from zinc is solidified and returned to the supplier where it is melted particles extracted and resold as fresh zinc.
All zinc not consumed by production goes back into the bath where it is returned to its molten state and reused.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Zinc is used in its molten state and is used with a fluxing agent. All zinc is consumed either with product or is returned to the bath where it is melted and reused. We re-capture fumes at the stack, recycle them into our process, all within GVRD opacity
